operation.add: {% if (order.j_text_color or order.j_backgrond_color) %} {% else %}{{ order.order_status }} {% endif %}

<script><!--
$(document).ready(function() {
    $('.editable').editable(function(value, settings) {
            var order_id = this.id;
            var text_value = '';

            $.ajax({
                url: '/index.php?route=api/order/history&api_token='+'{{api_token}}' + '&order_id=' + order_id,
                type: 'post',
                dataType: 'json',
                async: false,
                data: 'order_status_id=' + encodeURIComponent(value) + '&notify=0&append=0&override=0&comment=',
                success: function(json) {
                        if (json['error']) { text_value = json['error']; }

                        if (json['success']) {
                                var data = $.parseJSON(settings.data);
                                text_value = data[value];
                        }
                },
                error: function(xhr, ajaxOptions, thrownError) {
                        alert(thrownError + "\r\n" + xhr.statusText + "\r\n" + xhr.responseText);
                }
            });
            location.href='/admin/index.php?route=sale/order&user_token='+'{{user_token}}';  
            return(text_value);
        }, {
        data   : '{{status_json}}',
        type   : 'select',
        submit : 'OK'
    });
});
//--></script>

<script><!--
$(document).ready(function() {
    $('.editable').editable(function(value, settings) {
            var order_id = this.id;
            var text_value = '';

            $.ajax({
                url: '/index.php?route=api/order/history&api_token='+'{{api_token}}' + '&order_id=' + order_id,
                type: 'post',
                dataType: 'json',
                async: false,
                data: 'order_status_id=' + encodeURIComponent(value) + '&notify=0&append=0&override=0&comment=',
                success: function(json) {
                        if (json['error']) { text_value = json['error']; }

                        if (json['success']) {
                                var data = $.parseJSON(settings.data);
                                text_value = data[value];
                        }
                },
                error: function(xhr, ajaxOptions, thrownError) {
                        alert(thrownError + "\r\n" + xhr.statusText + "\r\n" + xhr.responseText);
                }
            });
            location.href='https://nositeli.com.ua/admin/index.php?route=common/dashboard&user_token='+'{{user_token}}';  
            return(text_value);
        }, {
        data   : '{{status_json}}',
        type   : 'select',
        submit : 'OK'
    });

});
//--></script>
